category_sources: source_facts.description says HTTP load generator; official GitHub README says oha sends load to a web application and shows a realtime TUI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is oha; official repository README uses oha as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes installation, usage, output, and tips.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/hatoo/oha, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names HTTP load generation and TUI animation; official README documents command-line usage and output formats.
